title: Tooltip Scaler
description: Rescales huge tooltips to fit on the screen. Has an option to round down to an integer GUI scale.
body: Scales down huge tooltips to fit on the screen. Has an option to round down to an integer GUI scale. This is intended for use with modpacks featuring long, dynamically generated tooltips that may go off screen on larger GUI scales and was tested with Craft to Exile 2.
